welcome.title: 🌸・Welcome new member!
welcome.desc:
**Hello {user}** — I'm **Waguri Kaoruko**, the manager of Gekka Bakery! 🍰

I'm so glad you visited **{guild}**~ You will love it here!

**Let's get started:**
> 📜 Get to know the server channels.
> 🎁 Type `/start` to claim your **welcome gift** and begin your journey! 🌸

*Wishing you sweet moments with everyone~* 💕

guild_create.welcome_desc:
*A warm welcome to Gekka Bakery!* 🍰

Thank you so much for inviting me to **{guild}**! I'll be your energetic companion and "bakery manager"~

**✨ Our Services:**
> 🎁 **New to the shop?** Type `/start` to claim your **welcome gift** & quick guide!
> 💬 **Chat with Waguri:** Type `/ask` or tag me to chat about my studies at Kikyo or baking with Rintaro!
> 💼 **Work & Economy:** Earn money for sweets via `/work`, claim daily allowance via `/daily`, shop via `/shop`.
> 🎲 **Fun with friends:** Test your luck with `/taixiu`, `/blackjack`, `/masoi` (Werewolf).
> 📜 **Help Guide:** Type `/help` for detailed command instructions!{supportLink}

*Hope we'll create sweet memories together!* 🌸

deletedata.warning_desc:
You are about to **permanently delete** all your gameplay data from Waguri. This action **CANNOT be undone** 🥺

**Will be deleted:** wallet/bank balance, inventory, job, level, pet, pigs/plants, Gekka Bakery progress, quests, achievements, affection level & Waguri's memories of you, and all other progress.
**Will be kept (by regulations):** Premium payment history (reconciliation) and confession logs (harassment investigation).

⚠️ If you have an **outstanding loan** or **are currently a clan leader**, please resolve these first.

Are you sure you want to delete?

help.guide_desc:
Hello there! I am Waguri Kaoruko~ Would you like to explore Kikyo Academy with me, or drop by Gekka Bakery for some strawberry shortcake? 🍰

Below is a list of command categories I can help you with. Choose a category from the select menu below, and I will introduce each command to you in detail!

*(Both **Slash** `/work` and **Prefix** `{prefix}work` are supported)*
help.err_ctrl: Only the command author can control this menu~ 🌸

commands.work: go to work to earn money (consumes energy)
commands.fish: go fishing to earn money (consumes energy)
commands.chop: go chop wood to earn money 🪓
commands.jobs: view & apply for jobs (list / info / apply)
commands.pet: pet system: adopt / feed / view stats 🐾
commands.album: view item collectors handbook and claim collection rewards 📖
commands.pass: view and claim Battle Pass rewards 📖
commands.nghingoi: go to sleep to fully restore energy (every 6h) 😴 (w!ngu)
commands.bank: bank account: balance / deposit / withdraw (balance · gui · rut)
commands.rob: attempt to rob another user (high risk!)
commands.baucua: bau cua tom ca (gourd-crab-fish dice game)
commands.loto: loto voice game 🎱 (buy 5-number ticket 01-90, join voice)
commands.masoi: werewolf party game 🐺 (4-15 players, deduction, hidden roles)
commands.duangua: horse racing 🐎 (bet on a horse, live race)
commands.premium: view Premium plans 💎 (increases AI chat quota)
commands.henho: go on dates & gift items to Waguri to increase affection 💖
commands.boi: fortune telling: daily / zodiac / Thay Do 🔮
commands.amlich: lunar calendar, can-chi, auspicious hours + Waguri remarks 🌙
commands.lixi: distribute red envelopes to the channel 🧧
commands.couple: relationships & marriage: propose / divorce / status (marry · divorce · status)
commands.action: interactions: hug / kiss / pat / poke / slap (hug · kiss · pat · poke · slap)
commands.dovui: trivia quiz 🧠 (answer fast in chat to win prizes)
commands.image: images of cats 🐱, dogs 🐶, or waifus 🌸
commands.announcement: view latest update announcements from developers (view · send) 📢
commands.setup: create custom Waguri channel + quick guide
commands.config: configure bot settings for this server (Manage Server)
commands.clan: create clan / mutual fund / ⚔️ clan war (create·join·info·list·deposit·withdraw·kick·disband·war)
commands.vote: vote on Top.gg to receive rewards 💝
commands.bot: bot status, support, invite (ping · about · support · invite)
